description: RAIGH Academy skill bundles — role-based collections mapped to certification tiers

bundles.name: Elements of Health AI
bundles.description: Digital literacy, generative AI basics, and health data awareness. The on-ramp for everyone — inspired by the University of Helsinki's Elements of AI (2M+ enrollments). No prerequisites. Smartphone-accessible.
bundles.target_audience: Anyone in health — students, workers, administrators, community health workers
bundles.certification: PAATHI Certificate of Completion — Elements of Health AI
learning_outcomes: Manage files and cloud storage professionally
Use generative AI tools safely and identify hallucinations
Understand health data types, patient rights, and consent requirements

bundles.name: Digital Health Foundations
bundles.description: Core digital health literacy for every health professional. Covers FHIR, DHIS2, records digitalization, and health data systems.
bundles.target_audience: All medical students, health workers, administrators
bundles.certification: PAATHI Certificate of Completion — Digital Health Foundations
learning_outcomes: Navigate FHIR resources and understand health data standards
Enter and interpret data in DHIS2
Design and execute a paper-to-digital migration protocol

bundles.name: AI Evaluation Practitioner
bundles.description: Critical appraisal of health AI evidence. Covers TRIPOD+AI, calibration, DCA, and model evaluation.
learning_outcomes: Systematically evaluate health AI studies using TRIPOD+AI
Assess model calibration and its clinical implications
Determine clinical utility using Decision Curve Analysis

bundles.name: Clinical AI Deployer
bundles.description: End-to-end clinical AI assessment from evidence chain to model documentation. Includes BRIDGE-TBI protocol as a case study.
bundles.target_audience: Clinical informaticians, deployment leads, hospital IT directors
learning_outcomes: Map any health AI tool through the 5-phase evidence chain
Apply the BRIDGE-TBI biomarker protocol and adapt for LMIC settings
Create comprehensive model cards for regulatory and clinical use

bundles.name: DPI Architect
bundles.description: Digital public infrastructure for health data exchange. Covers X-Road, interoperability platforms, and national health data architecture.
bundles.target_audience: Systems architects, national health IT leads, AIDA practitioners
learning_outcomes: Deploy and configure X-Road Security Servers for health data exchange
Design interoperable health data architectures using open standards

bundles.name: Regulatory Navigator
bundles.description: Health AI regulatory compliance across jurisdictions. Covers landscape analysis, FDA, EU AI Act, and African regulatory frameworks.
bundles.target_audience: Regulatory affairs professionals, policy advisors, health AI companies
learning_outcomes: Conduct structured regulatory landscape analysis for any country
Navigate health AI regulatory pathways across jurisdictions

bundles.name: Institutional Intelligence
bundles.description: Digitalize and transform health education institutions. Covers AI readiness assessment, medical school audits, and student record migration.
bundles.target_audience: University administrators, medical school leadership, education technologists
learning_outcomes: Assess institutional AI readiness using a standardized scorecard
Conduct comprehensive digital maturity audits of medical schools
Design and execute student record migration projects
